emails.subject: Ken Lay's speech
emails.body: Steve, I prepared this speech for Greg Whalley before the holidays, I wanted to make sure you received a copy. The presentation "The Impact of Higher Energy Prices to the US Economy" may be useful in Ken Lay's speech. M Maureen

emails.subject: Re: Ken Lay's Speech
emails.body: Re: Ken Lay's Speech So is it bigger than his tax cut on an annual average basis?
